items.name: 💢Build-a-Gojo : Battle Gojo Head (Serious)
items.description:
MUST READ! This item is apart of a set that you can mix and match to make your own customizable Satoru Gojo! 

There are 3 outfits so far (more to come):

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%F0%9F%91%95&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

There are 4 hairs AND 2 faces (injured & scars) to use this "Battle" head, along with 3 hair outlines to achieve the anime lineart style:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%F0%9F%92%A2&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

BODY BUNDLES:

Head: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/390982/Living-Phone

Torso: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/374650/Endoskeleton-Bundle

Arms: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/47635/Strong-Body-Dynamic

Legs: https://www.roblox.com/bundles/2890/Macho-Man
